# linacre.site

> Developer portfolio and toolset by David Linacre — a UK-based full-stack
> engineer and AI systems builder, available for freelance and contract work.

## What this site is

- Portfolio and case studies for open-source and client projects
- A curated directory of free developer tools (Toolkit)
- A practical learning roadmap for self-taught engineers (Learn)
- Browser-based developer utilities (Playground)
- An AI chat lab with rate-limited server proxies (Lab)
- Engineering write-ups (Blog)

## Key pages

- Home: https://www.linacre.site/
- Projects & case studies: https://www.linacre.site/projects
- Free developer toolkit: https://www.linacre.site/toolkit
- Learning roadmap: https://www.linacre.site/learn
- Engineering notes: https://www.linacre.site/blog
- About: https://www.linacre.site/about
- Contact (freelance/contract enquiries): https://www.linacre.site/contact

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/LIN4CRE
- Security contact: https://www.linacre.site/.well-known/security.txt

## Notes for agents

- All marketing pages serve static, semantic HTML (no JS required to read).
- The contact form and interactive tools require JavaScript.
- API endpoints under /api/ are rate limited and not intended for crawling.
